title: S/4HANA Migration Specialist
description: Structured learning path for consultants leading S/4HANA migration engagements. Begins with migration strategy and SAP Activate methodology, progresses through data migration tooling (LTMC), and concludes with go-live and hypercare best practices. Graduates are equipped to run fit-to-standard workshops and advise clients on Greenfield vs Brownfield decisions.

title: SAP BTP Developer and Architect
description: Comprehensive path from BTP fundamentals to production-grade extension and integration development. Covers Cloud Foundry and Kyma runtimes, Integration Suite, API Management, and SAP AI Core. Includes hands-on labs deploying Node.js and Python microservices to BTP and connecting them to S/4HANA via the SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

title: SuccessFactors HCM Transformation Lead
description: Designed for organizational change managers and HR transformation leads driving SuccessFactors deployments. Blends Hire-to-Retire process design with change management frameworks (Prosci ADKAR), stakeholder communication strategies, and adoption measurement. Includes a capstone project designing a training and change plan for a 5,000-employee SuccessFactors rollout.
